meeting_notes: Video call, 60 minutes. Agenda: review questionnaire answers, understand project vision, assess fit. Conducted: 2026-03-17T14:00:00-07:00. Responses from seed data (test mode). Client stated: 'Somos un grupo médico establecido, necesitamos una clínica privada de alta calidad en La Paz que cumpla con todos los requisitos de COFEPRIS. Tenemos definido el programa: 10 consultorios, urgencias, laboratorio, farmacia, rayos-X y áreas de apoyo — aproximadamente 1,500 m².' Client confirmed flat urban lot with municipal services available, 3,500 sqm site. Budget stated at $1.8M USD including construction. Assessment: Client demonstrates clear awareness of COFEPRIS regulatory requirements, specific clinical program, and realistic budget signal. Design engagement is high — client described functional and clinical requirements with precision, and explicitly mentioned specialized systems.

design_engagement.evidence: Client (medical group) specified detailed clinical program with specific room types, areas, and special systems (medical gas, specialized HVAC, backup generator). Explicit mention of COFEPRIS compliance demonstrates regulatory awareness beyond typical client.

budget_realism.evidence: Budget of $1.8M USD for 1,500 sqm health center exceeds market benchmark. At MXN 40,000/sqm midpoint × 1,500 sqm = MXN 60M (~USD 3M at current rates) for construction; client budget is conservative but sufficient for this program. Architecture fee of USD 216,000 (seed data) is 12% of approx. USD 1.8M, which is well aligned.

scope_clarity.evidence: Specific 11-space program provided with sqm breakdowns. Confirmed flat urban lot. Special features (medical gas, HVAC, generator) explicitly identified. COFEPRIS as health authority named.

collaborative_style.evidence: Client is a medical group (design_engaged per seed data), communicates professionally, provided complete information upfront. Institutional client — expect structured decision-making process.

rationale: All four assessment dimensions score 4 or above, giving an average of 4.5/5 — well above the 3.5 threshold. Budget realism (5/5) is particularly strong given the well-capitalized medical group profile and realistic construction budget. Scope clarity (5/5) is exceptional — the client arrived with a detailed clinical program, confirmed site, and named regulatory authority, reducing discovery uncertainty to near zero.
